reviews.author: gaurav
reviews.review_body: As a parent, I feel blessed to have my child at SNS Noida. It's all-around development with supportive teachers. What I found amazing was their efforts during COVID to help the neighbourhood students with resources. I find my child well adjusted with the students admitted under RTE. When I go to school functions I see their active participation and are even given academic support. As a society, we must treat all children alike, whatever the strata. Shiv Nadar through its schools and Vidyagyan are doing a wonderful job. I hope other schools in Noida are doing the same.

reviews.author: Akta Sehgal
reviews.review_body:
Many Talk about RTE act  and inclusivity, but some walk the talk, Shiv Nadar School truly walks the talk . Children are considered equals and are given the same love and care as any child should. Not only are kids taken care of , time to time value added sessions are also done for the parents of Neighborhood children.
In Addition to this , Students also help them in many ways to better their skills like spoken English or the supportive Environment needed to study and excel.

I am glad to be associated with a school which believes in inclusivity and provides equal opportunity to excel

reviews.author: Azim Ahmad
reviews.review_body: Our children are students of Shiv Nadar School,Noida. The school has been inculcating good values in children. Most commendable is their neighborhood education scheme under RTA where they are providing top notch education to kids from neighbouring villages... Most importantly,they are doing it honestly not just paper work.
